displayNameZh: shadcn-ui Skill Prompt 输入动画
summary: Yt Shadcn Prompt component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的shadcn-ui Skill Prompt 输入动画组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-shadcn-prompt/src/YtShadcnPrompt.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtShadcnPrompt` and `ytShadcnPromptDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Shadcn Prompt Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-shadcn-prompt to my project. Preserve the exported YtShadcnPromptProps API and register the YtShadcnPrompt composition with the default props.
